title: TotalAV vs McAfee 2026: Best Value Antivirus Comparison
description: Comparing two affordable antivirus solutions. Which offers better protection, features, and value for your money?

verdict.overallReasoning: McAfee wins for families and users with multiple devices — the unlimited device family plan provides unmatched value. The phishing protection is best-in-class (100% in our tests). TotalAV wins on pure affordability and system optimization tools. Choose McAfee for family protection; choose TotalAV for the absolute lowest price with solid protection.
